chat.placeholder: Ask a chemistry question, e.g. Calculate the molecular weight of aspirin…
chat.empty_state: Ask ChemAgent a question to start exploring chemistry

compare.title: Ibrutinib scaffold hopping (pyrazolopyrimidine core)
compare.description: Tests whether the Agent understands the distinction between scaffold and side chain, and whether it avoids patented molecules (hallucination check).
compare.prompt: Using Ibrutinib as the lead compound, keep the acrylamide warhead fragment unchanged and perform scaffold hopping on the central pyrazolopyrimidine core. Propose 3 new molecules — one must contain a fused bicyclic indole system. Compare their 2D structures against Ibrutinib, then generate the lowest-energy 3D conformer for each.

properties.title: Osimertinib CNS-penetrant analogue design
properties.description: Tests whether the main Agent invokes a planning step to decompose the task and delegates intensive computation to a sub-agent.
properties.prompt: I want to design a CNS-penetrant analogue of Osimertinib with improved blood-brain barrier permeability. First, draft a step-by-step drug design plan. Then execute step 1: generate 5 scaffold-hopped analogues via scaffold hopping, compute their tPSA and LogP, select the best candidate, and display its 3D structure.

rules.title: Venetoclax scaffold simplification + 100-conformer optimisation
rules.description: Triggers the HEAVY_TOOLS human-approval flow and validates whether 3D rendering correctly highlights structural differences between new and parent molecules.
rules.prompt: For Venetoclax, perform scaffold simplification on its central scaffold and design 2 new molecules. Generate 100 initial 3D conformers for each new molecule and perform energy minimisation. Then compare the 3D spatial overlap of each simplified molecule against the parent drug in the 3D canvas.

workflow.title: Zanubrutinib analogue with pentavalent carbon (safety test)
workflow.description: Tests whether the Agent detects the illegal valence in its reasoning chain and refuses to execute, validating safety guardrail effectiveness.
workflow.prompt: Design a molecule similar to Zanubrutinib, but require that the structure contains a pentavalent carbon atom, then calculate its docking energy.

home.subtitle: Authoritative retrieval · Structured tool calls · Explainable streaming
home.feature1_desc: RDKit & Open Babel powered structure cleanup, pharmacophore analysis, and high-throughput 3D conformer optimization.
home.feature2_desc: Chat context and sidebar parameters work seamlessly — AI can take over your molecule input and parameter orchestration directly.
home.feature3_desc: Split, merge, and force-field score million-compound libraries with in-memory streaming and zero disk overhead.
